original_final_question: Which counties from the Washington school districts that met ELA performance >= 68% for all students, all grades in each year from 2014-15 through 2017-18 are in Eastern Washington? List the county names in alphabetical order separated by `, `. Your response should be in the format [Answer].
reasoning_chain_text: 1. Identify Washington school districts with ELA performance at least 68 percent for all students and all grades in 2014-15.
2. From those districts, keep the ones meeting the same condition in 2015-16.
3. From the remaining districts, keep the ones meeting the same condition in 2016-17.
4. From the remaining districts, keep the ones meeting the same condition in 2017-18 and map the surviving districts to counties.
5. From those counties, keep the ones in Eastern Washington and return their names in alphabetical order, separated by comma and space.
original_reasoning_chain: Intersection -> counties {King, Clark, Pierce, Whitman, Thurston, Spokane}
HOP 2 (d=1, Wikipedia - node 5 depends on hop 1 counties):
Node 5: Eastern Washington counties among those -> Whitman County, Spokane County
Final answer: Spokane County, Whitman County
